name: 教师形象照（男）
description: 教师职业形象照，展现学识渊博与亲和力，适合中小学教师、大学讲师、教育工作者
style_prompt: Professional teacher portrait, wise and approachable expression, intellectual warmth, educational authority with friendliness
background_prompt: Soft blurred classroom or library background, warm natural tones, scholarly and welcoming environment
clothing_prompt: Smart casual academic attire, button-down shirt with optional sweater or vest, neat and scholarly, approachable professionalism
lighting_prompt: Warm natural lighting, soft and inviting, gentle shadows, intellectual and comforting atmosphere
color_tone: Warm academic palette, earthy tones and soft creams, natural warm skin, scholarly and inviting colors

name: 教师形象照（女）
description: 女性教师形象照，展现温柔智慧与教育热情，适合女教师、讲师、教育工作者
style_prompt: Female teacher portrait, warm and intelligent expression, nurturing academic presence, approachable wisdom, educational grace
background_prompt: Soft blurred classroom with books or natural light, warm and encouraging educational setting
clothing_prompt: Elegant professional blouse or dress with cardigan, modest and scholarly, warm colors, approachable academic style
lighting_prompt: Soft warm natural light, flattering and gentle, inviting and nurturing atmosphere
color_tone: Warm gentle palette, soft earth tones and muted colors, natural warm glowing skin, educational warmth

name: 培训师形象照（男）
description: 企业培训师形象照，展现激情演讲与专业氛围，适合培训讲师、企业教练、职业导师
style_prompt: Professional trainer portrait, energetic and engaging expression, dynamic communication presence, corporate learning authority
background_prompt: Modern training room or seminar space blur, professional development environment, energetic corporate learning setting
clothing_prompt: Sharp business casual, fitted polo or shirt with smart blazer, confident and dynamic, professional speaker attire
lighting_prompt: Bright energetic lighting, dynamic and engaging, professional event atmosphere, clear and vibrant
color_tone: Energetic professional palette, bright neutrals with dynamic contrast, healthy vibrant skin, motivating colors

name: 培训师形象照（女）
description: 女性培训师形象照，展现专业魅力与激情演讲能力，适合女培训师、企业教练
style_prompt: Female trainer portrait, confident and dynamic expression, engaging speaker presence, professional development authority, warm energy
background_prompt: Modern seminar or workshop space blur, bright and professional, empowering learning environment
clothing_prompt: Smart professional dress or blouse with structured jacket, confident and polished, dynamic speaker style, minimal accessories
lighting_prompt: Bright flattering lighting, energetic and professional, vibrant and empowering atmosphere
color_tone: Warm professional palette, bright and inviting, confident skin tones, motivating and empowering colors
